---
title: "STAT460 Logistic Regression Analysis"
author: "Beast"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    number_sections: false
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: false
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
subtitle: Dalton & Madilin Super Document 2
mainfont: TimesNewRoman
sansfont: TimesNewRoman
monofont: TimesNewRoman
---

# Load Relevant R Libraries

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rmarkdown); library(knitr); library(moments);library(mdsr);library(nnet)
library(scatterplot3d); library(corrplot); library(pso);library(usethis)
library(psych); library(GPArotation); library(lavaan);library(here)
library(haven);library(tidyverse);library(tidyverse);library(ggplot2)
```

# Importing DO NOT MOVE TO MAIN DOCUMENT

```{r}
NHANES2011 <- read_xpt("NHANES2011.xpt")
NHANES2013 <- read_xpt("NHANES2013.xpt") 
NHANES2015 <- read_xpt("NHANES2015.xpt") 
NHANES2017 <- read_xpt("NHANES2017.xpt") 
NHANES2021 <- read_xpt("NHANES2021.xpt") 
NHANESP2017 <- read_xpt("NHANESP2017.xpt") 
```

# Table Building

```{r}
## 2017 Table
PFAsVars2017 <- NHANES2017 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "RIAGENDR", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "INDFMPIR", # Economic status
         # Blood
         "BPXSY1", "BPXSY2", "BPXSY3", "BPXSY4",
         "BPXDI1", "BPXDI2", "BPXDI3", "BPXDI4",
         
         # Chol
         "LBXTC", "LBDHDD",
         
         "LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXBFOA", "LBXMFOS", "LBXNFOA", #PFAs
         
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", "MCQ500", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F", # Cardiovascular
         
         # Possible Other Confounders
         "SMQ020", "SMQ040", "PAQ650", "PAQ655", "PAQ665"
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(MCQ160L = coalesce(MCQ160L, MCQ500)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFHS = log(LBXPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFNA = log(LBXPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXBFOA = log(LBXBFOA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXMFOS = log(LBXMFOS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXNFOA = log(LBXNFOA)) |>
  mutate(
    SBP = rowMeans(across(BPXSY1:BPXSY4), na.rm = TRUE),
    DBP = rowMeans(across(BPXDI1:BPXDI4), na.rm = TRUE))   |>
  mutate(
    RIDRETH3 = factor(RIDRETH3,
      levels = c(3, 4, 1, 2, 6, 7),
      labels = c(
        "Non-Hispanic White",
        "Non-Hispanic Black",
        "Mexican American",
        "Other Hispanic",
        "Non-Hispanic Asian",
        "Other/Multi-Racial")))|>
  mutate(DIQ010_cat = factor(DIQ010,
    levels = c(2, 3, 1), 
    labels = c("No", "Borderline", "Yes"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_yes = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 1 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  mutate(
    RIAGENDR_cat = factor(RIAGENDR,
      levels = c(2, 1),
      labels = c("Female", "Male"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_borderline = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 3 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  filter(MCQ010 != 7 & MCQ010 != 9,
         MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9,
         MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9,
         SMQ020 != 7 & SMQ020 != 9,
         PAQ650 != 7 & PAQ650 != 9,
         MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ010 = ifelse(MCQ010 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160G = ifelse(MCQ160G == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160K = ifelse(MCQ160K == 1, 1, 0),
         SMQ020 = ifelse(SMQ020 == 1, 1, 0),
         PAQ650 = ifelse(PAQ650 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160M = ifelse(MCQ160M == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160L = ifelse(MCQ160L == 1, 1, 0),
         RIAGENDR = ifelse(RIAGENDR == 1, 1, 0)) |>
  filter(!is.na(LBXPFHS))

## 2015 Table
PFAsVars2015 <- NHANES2015 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "RIAGENDR", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "INDFMPIR", # Economic status
         # Blood
         "BPXSY1", "BPXSY2", "BPXSY3", "BPXSY4",
         "BPXDI1", "BPXDI2", "BPXDI3", "BPXDI4", 
         
         # Chol
         "LBXTC", "LBDHDD",
         
         "LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXBFOA", "LBXMFOS", "LBXNFOA", #PFAs
         
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F", # Cardiovascular
         
         # Possible Other Confounders
         "SMQ020", "SMQ040", "PAQ650", "PAQ655", "PAQ665"
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFHS = log(LBXPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFNA = log(LBXPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXBFOA = log(LBXBFOA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXMFOS = log(LBXMFOS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXNFOA = log(LBXNFOA)) |>
  mutate(
    SBP = rowMeans(across(BPXSY1:BPXSY4), na.rm = TRUE),
    DBP = rowMeans(across(BPXDI1:BPXDI4), na.rm = TRUE))   |>
  mutate(
    RIDRETH3 = factor(RIDRETH3,
      levels = c(3, 4, 1, 2, 6, 7),
      labels = c(
        "Non-Hispanic White",
        "Non-Hispanic Black",
        "Mexican American",
        "Other Hispanic",
        "Non-Hispanic Asian",
        "Other/Multi-Racial")))|>
  mutate(DIQ010_cat = factor(DIQ010,
    levels = c(2, 3, 1), 
    labels = c("No", "Borderline", "Yes"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_yes = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 1 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  mutate(
    RIAGENDR_cat = factor(RIAGENDR,
      levels = c(2, 1),
      labels = c("Female", "Male"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_borderline = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 3 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  filter(MCQ010 != 7 & MCQ010 != 9,
         MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9,
         MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9,
         SMQ020 != 7 & SMQ020 != 9,
         PAQ650 != 7 & PAQ650 != 9,
         MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ010 = ifelse(MCQ010 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160G = ifelse(MCQ160G == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160K = ifelse(MCQ160K == 1, 1, 0),
         SMQ020 = ifelse(SMQ020 == 1, 1, 0),
         PAQ650 = ifelse(PAQ650 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160M = ifelse(MCQ160M == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160L = ifelse(MCQ160L == 1, 1, 0),
         RIAGENDR = ifelse(RIAGENDR == 1, 1, 0)) |>
  filter(!is.na(LBXPFHS))

## 2013 Table Building
PFAsVars2013 <- NHANES2013 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "RIAGENDR", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "INDFMPIR", # Economic status
         # Blood
         "BPXSY1", "BPXSY2", "BPXSY3", "BPXSY4",
         "BPXDI1", "BPXDI2", "BPXDI3", "BPXDI4", 
         
         # Chol
         "LBXTC", "LBDHDD",
         
         "SSPFHS", "SSPFNA", "SSBFOA", "SSMFOS", "SSNFOS", #PFAs
         
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", "MCQ160O", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F", # Cardiovascular
         
         # Possible Other Confounders
         "SMQ020", "SMQ040", "PAQ650", "PAQ655", "PAQ665"
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logSSPFHS = log(SSPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logSSPFNA = log(SSPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logSSBFOA = log(SSBFOA)) |>
  mutate(logSSMFOS = log(SSMFOS)) |>
  mutate(logSSNFOS = log(SSNFOS)) |>
  mutate(
    SBP = rowMeans(across(BPXSY1:BPXSY4), na.rm = TRUE),
    DBP = rowMeans(across(BPXDI1:BPXDI4), na.rm = TRUE))  |>
  mutate(
    RIDRETH3 = factor(RIDRETH3,
      levels = c(3, 4, 1, 2, 6, 7),
      labels = c(
        "Non-Hispanic White",
        "Non-Hispanic Black",
        "Mexican American",
        "Other Hispanic",
        "Non-Hispanic Asian",
        "Other/Multi-Racial")))|>
  mutate(DIQ010_cat = factor(DIQ010,
    levels = c(2, 3, 1), 
    labels = c("No", "Borderline", "Yes"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_yes = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 1 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  mutate(
    RIAGENDR_cat = factor(RIAGENDR,
      levels = c(2, 1),
      labels = c("Female", "Male"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_borderline = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 3 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  filter(MCQ010 != 7 & MCQ010 != 9,
         MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9,
         MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9,
         SMQ020 != 7 & SMQ020 != 9,
         PAQ650 != 7 & PAQ650 != 9,
         MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ010 = ifelse(MCQ010 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160G = ifelse(MCQ160G == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160K = ifelse(MCQ160K == 1, 1, 0),
         SMQ020 = ifelse(SMQ020 == 1, 1, 0),
         PAQ650 = ifelse(PAQ650 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160M = ifelse(MCQ160M == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160L = ifelse(MCQ160L == 1, 1, 0),
         RIAGENDR = ifelse(RIAGENDR == 1, 1, 0)) |>
  filter(!is.na(SSPFHS))

## 2011 Table Building
PFAsVars2011 <- NHANES2011 |>
  select("SEQN", "RIDAGEYR", "RIDRETH3", "RIAGENDR", # Individual and age/ethnicity
         "BMXWT", "BMXHT", "BMXBMI", "BMXWAIST",  # Body measurement
         "INDFMPIR", # Economic status
         # Blood
         "BPXSY1", "BPXSY2", "BPXSY3", "BPXSY4",
         "BPXDI1", "BPXDI2", "BPXDI3", "BPXDI4", 
         
         # Chol
         "LBXTC", "LBDHDD",
         
         "LBXPFHS", "LBXPFNA", "LBXPFOA", "LBXPFOS", #PFAs
         
         # Medical Questions
         "MCQ010", "MCQ160G", "MCQ160K", # Respiratory & IMMUNE
         "DIQ010", "DIQ160", # METABOLIC
         "MCQ160M", "MCQ160L", # Endo/Liver
         "MCQ160B", "MCQ160C", "MCQ160D", "MCQ160E", "MCQ160F", # Cardiovascular
         
         # Possible Other Confounders
         "SMQ020", "SMQ040", "PAQ650", "PAQ655", "PAQ665"
         ) |> 
  filter(RIDAGEYR >= 12 & RIDAGEYR <= 75) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFHS = log(LBXPFHS)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFNA = log(LBXPFNA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFOA = log(LBXPFOA)) |>
  mutate(logLBXPFOS = log(LBXPFOS)) |>
  mutate(
    SBP = rowMeans(across(BPXSY1:BPXSY4), na.rm = TRUE),
    DBP = rowMeans(across(BPXDI1:BPXDI4), na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  mutate(
    RIDRETH3 = factor(RIDRETH3,
      levels = c(3, 4, 1, 2, 6, 7),
      labels = c(
        "Non-Hispanic White",
        "Non-Hispanic Black",
        "Mexican American",
        "Other Hispanic",
        "Non-Hispanic Asian",
        "Other/Multi-Racial")))|>
  mutate(DIQ010_cat = factor(DIQ010,
    levels = c(2, 3, 1), 
    labels = c("No", "Borderline", "Yes"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_yes = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 1 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  mutate(
    RIAGENDR_cat = factor(RIAGENDR,
      levels = c(2, 1),
      labels = c("Female", "Male"))) |>
  mutate(
    DIQ010_borderline = case_when(
      DIQ010 == 3 ~ 1,
      DIQ010 == 2 ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
  filter(MCQ010 != 7 & MCQ010 != 9,
         MCQ160G != 7 & MCQ160G != 9,
         MCQ160K != 7 & MCQ160K != 9,
         SMQ020 != 7 & SMQ020 != 9,
         PAQ650 != 7 & PAQ650 != 9,
         MCQ160M != 7 & MCQ160M != 9) |>
  mutate(MCQ010 = ifelse(MCQ010 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160G = ifelse(MCQ160G == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160K = ifelse(MCQ160K == 1, 1, 0),
         SMQ020 = ifelse(SMQ020 == 1, 1, 0),
         PAQ650 = ifelse(PAQ650 == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160M = ifelse(MCQ160M == 1, 1, 0),
         MCQ160L = ifelse(MCQ160L == 1, 1, 0),
         RIAGENDR = ifelse(RIAGENDR == 1, 1, 0)) |>
  filter(!is.na(LBXPFHS))
```

# Logistic Regression Models

## 2011

### Respiratory

```{r}
# MCQ010
logRegAsthma2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011, 
                        MCQ010 ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                          logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegAsthma2011)

# MCQ160G
logRegEmphysema2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011,
                           MCQ160G ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                             logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                             BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegEmphysema2011)

# MCQ160K
logRegBron2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011,
                      MCQ160K ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                        logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegBron2011)

```

### Metabolic

```{r}
# DIQ010
logRegDiabetesYes2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011,
                      DIQ010_yes ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                        logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesYes2011)

logRegDiabetesBorderline2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011,
                      DIQ010_borderline ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                        logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesBorderline2011)

# DIQ160


```

### Endocrine

```{r}
# MCQ160M
logRegThyroid2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011, 
                        MCQ160M ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                          logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegThyroid2011)

# MCQ160L
logRegLiver2011 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2011, 
                        MCQ160L ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXPFOA +
                          logLBXPFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegLiver2011)

```

### Cardiovascular

```{r}
# MCQ160B


# MCQ160C


# MCQ160D


# MCQ160E


# MCQ160F


```


## 2013

### Respiratory

```{r}
# MCQ010
logRegAsthma2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013, 
                        MCQ010 ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                          logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegAsthma2013)

# MCQ160G
logRegEmphysema2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013,
                           MCQ160G ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                             logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                             BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegEmphysema2013)

# MCQ160K
logRegBron2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013,
                      MCQ160K ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                          logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegBron2013)

```

### Metabolic

```{r}
# DIQ010
logRegDiabetesYes2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013,
                      DIQ010_yes ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                          logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesYes2013)

logRegDiabetesBorderline2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013,
                      DIQ010_borderline ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                          logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesBorderline2013)

# DIQ160


```

### Endocrine

```{r}
# MCQ160M
logRegThyroid2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013, 
                        MCQ160M ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                          logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegThyroid2013)

# MCQ160L
logRegLiver2013 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2013, 
                        MCQ160L ~ logSSPFHS + logSSPFNA + logSSBFOA +
                          logSSMFOS + logSSNFOS + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegLiver2013)

```

### Cardiovascular

```{r}
# MCQ160B


# MCQ160C


# MCQ160D


# MCQ160E


# MCQ160F

```


## 2015

### Respiratory

```{r}
# MCQ010
logRegAsthma2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015, 
                        MCQ010 ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegAsthma2015)

# MCQ160G
logRegEmphysema2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015,
                           MCQ160G ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                             BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegEmphysema2015)

# MCQ160K
logRegBron2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015,
                      MCQ160K ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegBron2015)

# MCQ160O
logRegCOPD2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015,
                      MCQ160O ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegCOPD2015) 

```

### Metabolic

```{r}
# DIQ010
logRegDiabetesYes2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015,
                      DIQ010_yes ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesYes2015)

logRegDiabetesBorderline2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015,
                      DIQ010_borderline ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesBorderline2015)

# DIQ160

```

### Endocrine

```{r}
# MCQ160M
logRegThyroid2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015, 
                        MCQ160M ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegThyroid2015)

# MCQ160L
logRegLiver2015 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2015, 
                        MCQ160L ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegLiver2015)

```

### Cardiovascular

```{r}
# MCQ160B


# MCQ160C


# MCQ160D


# MCQ160E


# MCQ160F

```


## 2017

### Respiratory

```{r}
# MCQ010
logRegAsthma2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017, 
                        MCQ010 ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegAsthma2017)

# MCQ160G
logRegEmphysema2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017,
                           MCQ160G ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                             BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegEmphysema2017)

# MCQ160K
logRegBron2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017,
                      MCQ160K ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegBron2017)

# MCQ160O
logRegCOPD2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017,
                      MCQ160O ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegCOPD2017) 

```

### Metabolic

```{r}
# DIQ010
logRegDiabetesYes2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017,
                      DIQ010_yes ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesYes2017)

logRegDiabetesBorderline2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017,
                      DIQ010_borderline ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                        BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)

summary(logRegDiabetesBorderline2017)

# DIQ160

```

### Endocrine

```{r}
# MCQ160M
logRegThyroid2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017, 
                        MCQ160M ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegThyroid2017)

# MCQ160L merged with MCQ500
logRegLiver2017 <- glm(data = PFAsVars2017, 
                        MCQ160L ~ logLBXPFHS + logLBXPFNA + logLBXBFOA +
                          logLBXMFOS + logLBXNFOA + RIDAGEYR + RIDRETH3 + BMXBMI + 
                          BMXWAIST + INDFMPIR + SMQ020 + RIAGENDR_cat, family = binomial)
summary(logRegLiver2017)

```

### Cardiovascular

```{r}
# MCQ160B


# MCQ160C


# MCQ160D


# MCQ160E


# MCQ160F

```
